name: Free Crypto News
description: Free, real-time cryptocurrency news API aggregating 200+ sources. No API key required. REST JSON, RSS/Atom, WebSocket, AI analysis, RAG, MCP server, ChatGPT plugin. Open source (MIT).

authentication.description: No authentication required. All endpoints are free and public.

capabilities.name: news_retrieval
capabilities.description: Fetch, search, and filter real-time crypto news from 200+ sources

capabilities.name: ai_analysis
capabilities.description: AI-powered summarization, sentiment analysis, research, and RAG

capabilities.name: market_data
capabilities.description: Real-time prices, market caps, Fear & Greed, gas, yields, derivatives

capabilities.name: sentiment
capabilities.description: AI sentiment analysis from news and social media

capabilities.name: on_chain
capabilities.description: Whale alerts, liquidations, exchange flows, token unlocks

capabilities.name: historical
capabilities.description: News archive from 2010-present, AI predictions, backtesting

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol server for Claude, ChatGPT Dev Mode
